TRANSMUTE.title: Transmute
TRANSMUTE.description: [gold]Transforms[/gold] into a random card. If this card is in your [gold]Deck[/gold], it will also be [gold]Transformed[/gold] in the [gold]Deck[/gold].
ASPECTS_PALETTE.title: The Aspect's Palette
ASPECTS_PALETTE.description: [gold]Intents[/gold] are classified into [red]Aggressive[/red], [blue]Defensive[/blue], [orange]Buff[/orange], [purple]Debuff[/purple] and [green]Other[/green]. When multiple types of [gold]Intents[/gold] are present, all corresponding color pools are used.
